commands.ci_test: mix ecto.create --quiet && mix ecto.migrate --quiet && mix test

test_patterns.flash_assert: assert_flash(view, :error, "message") - use ConnCase helper, not DOM queries
test_patterns.provider_session_setup: insert program with provider_id, then program_session with program_id and date
test_patterns.insert_child: insert_child_with_guardian(parent: parent_schema, first_name: "Alice") - parent must be ecto schema
test_patterns.event_testing: EventTestHelper.setup_test_events() in setup, then TestEventPublisher.get_events() for assertions - safe for async: true (process-local)
test_patterns.bulk_check_in_pattern: participation_record_schema factory creates own session+child internally, overrides with session_id:/child_id: work fine

backlog.item: program_detail_live integration tests - booking flow when registration upcoming
backlog.reason: upcoming status (start in future) also blocks enrollment - similar pattern already tested for closed
already thoroughly covered by explicit tests
get_conversation_title, own_message?, get_sender_name are pure functions - low risk
